full_text:
Shan Yang 單颺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shan Yang (單颺). Asked by Qiao Xuan for interpretation of an omen, and predicted Cao Pi’s ascension to the throne. Shan Yang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
